Where Nairobi comes to look — and to learn.

LIKA HOUSE is a hand-built studio tucked just off Argwings Kodhek Road, Kilimani, where Lily does bridal and editorial makeup by day — and teaches it, patiently, one student at a time.

Two ways in

Book a look, or learn to do your own.

Most studios pick one lane. LIKA HOUSE runs both — professional makeup for your event, and hands-on training if you want the skill for yourself.

Bridal parties, photoshoots, editorial looks and everyday glam — in-studio or on location for your event day.

The studio

Built by hand, on Argwings Kodhek Road.

Reclaimed wood, a bulb-lit vanity, African print textiles — the space itself is part of the LIKA HOUSE story, and it's the first thing reviewers mention.

"It has an authentic, rustic vibe that makes it stand out. The owner is super friendly and a very good teacher — patient with her students."

That's Lily: founder, lead artist, and the person doing the teaching herself — not a franchise, not a rotating cast of contractors.

In their words

Real reviews from Google.

Lika House did makeup for the bride and the whole bridal party on the wedding day — reliable, punctual, affordable and excellent work throughout.

Home / Services

Makeup for the day that matters.

Every look is built for real Nairobi conditions — humidity, long church services, longer photo sessions — and for skin, not just the camera.

What LIKA HOUSE offers

Bridal & wedding party

Bride, bridesmaids and mothers — coordinated looks that hold up through the whole day. On-location visits available.

Editorial & creative

Bold, camera-ready looks for photoshoots, campaigns and creative briefs — built with the photographer's lighting in mind.

Everyday & event glam

Birthdays, graduations, nights out — polished, natural-leaning makeup that photographs beautifully and lasts.

Group bookings

Bridal parties and friend groups booked together — one studio visit, matched but personalised looks for everyone.

On-location

Home, hotel or venue visits for wedding mornings — reviewers specifically call out Lily showing up and delivering on the day.

Portrait & personal styling

One-on-one sessions to find a look that's truly yours — for a shoot, a milestone, or just because.

⚠ Pricing: service pricing isn't set on the demo yet — to be confirmed with Lily during discovery and either listed as ranges or left "price on enquiry," her choice.

Home / Academy

Learn to do your own face — properly.

Hands-on training in the same studio Lily works from, taught the way her students describe it: patient, meticulous, and built for complete beginners.

Why train here

Real technique, taught face-to-face.

Students describe multi-day, hands-on courses that take them from "doesn't like makeup" to confident doing their own — taught by someone reviewers repeatedly call a mentor, not just an instructor.

  • Small, hands-on sessions — not a lecture hall
  • Multi-day format reported by students (exact length & syllabus to confirm)
  • Real tools, real faces, real feedback from Lily directly
  • Suited to complete beginners as well as those levelling up
Ask about the next intake

⚠ Course dates, duration and fees are set by Lily and confirmed at discovery — not invented for this demo.
